issues.problem: TrainerSuggestions is mounted with courseId from hardcoded sampleCourses (numeric ids 1/2). Real Course ids are Prisma cuids and this page never fetches GET /api/courses, so every 'Suggest trainers' click POSTs { courseId: "1" } -> 404, and the panel can only ever show its error state; Assign would 404 identically. Feature is unreachable end-to-end. onAssigned={refetch} was also dropped because there is nothing to refetch on a static page.
issues.fixHint: Fetch real courses on this page (GET /api/courses, response shape { courses: CourseDto[] } where CourseDto has id (cuid), name, date YYYY-MM-DD, subjects string[], location, participants, notes, price number, status, trainer { id, name, email, location } | null). Render rows from that data, mount the panel with the real id, and pass onAssigned={refetch} so an assign updates the table.

orchestratorNote: The original 'do not rewrite this page to fetch real data' constraint is LIFTED for this fix — it caused the defect. Convert the page to fetch GET /api/courses (loading/error states per app conventions), keep the table structure and existing action buttons as-is otherwise, and wire onAssigned to the refetch. Do not touch backend files or TrainerSuggestions.tsx (no blocking issues there).
